isolation.flowValidatorGuidanceSection: Flow Validator Guidance: Mini source/build surface
isolation.boundary: Validated only from the delivered top-level mini/ surface using its local validator, source inspection, and generated preview artifacts.
claimsExcluded: No reliance on frontend/src/views/MiniDemo/index.vue or mini-demo-local.html as final evidence.

commandsRun.observation: Node present for mini tooling: v24.14.1
Validator exited 0, ran 13 passing tests, rebuilt dist/local-preview.html and dist/validation-summary.json, and confirmed real mini entry/config/build files plus local-only disclosure.
Build exited 0 and refreshed the local-only preview artifacts without claiming WeChat runtime coverage.

assertions.title: The new top-level mini/ app has a real Mini-specific local validator
assertions.proofSummary: Top-level mini/ contains real Mini entry/config files and a named validate script. The validator passed and explicitly verified Mini-specific scaffold files plus generated artifacts from mini/.

commandEvidence.observed: mini_validate passed: verified real mini entry/config files and local-only preview/build evidence from mini/; tests 13, pass 13; artifacts: dist/local-preview.html, dist/validation-summary.json

sourceReferences.text: throw new Error('app.json must declare pages/home/index as a real Mini entry page')
throw new Error('project.config.json must declare compileType=miniprogram')

artifactReferences.reason: Copied generated local preview artifact from mini/dist for evidence retention.
Copied generated validation summary artifact from mini/dist for evidence retention.

assertions.title: The local Mini surface stays explicit about non-runtime validation
assertions.proofSummary: Source and generated preview both label the surface as local-only source/build validation and explicitly deny simulator/device/runtime proof.

commandEvidence.observed: Validator required local-only disclosure in pages/home/index.wxml and dist/local-preview.html, including text that the preview is not evidence of real WeChat simulator, device, or runtime success.
Build log states: validation posture: local-only source/build evidence from mini/; no real WeChat runtime coverage claimed.

sourceReferences.text: throw new Error('dist/local-preview.html must disclose that validation is local-only and not real WeChat runtime coverage')
Generated from the committed mini/ source tree. This is not evidence of real WeChat simulator, device, or runtime success.

artifactReferences.reason: Generated preview contains the visible local-only disclaimer.
Generated summary records validationMode=local-source-build-only and disclaimers.

assertions.title: The Mini home renders one authenticated payload-backed card per canonical stock_code
assertions.proofSummary: The page wires Bearer-backed digest hydration, normalizes digest rows to compact canonical stock_code cards, dedupes to one card per stock_code, preserves waiting-state placeholders, and the generated preview/summary show 3 raw rows -> 2 rendered cards with one placeholder retained.

commandEvidence.observed: Passing tests include: digest reads reuse the login-issued bearer token on the protected read path; selectCompactDigestCards keeps one canonical card per stock_code and strips non-compact fields; authenticated Mini home state renders deduped digest cards and preserves placeholder waiting cards.

sourceReferences.text: <text class="contract-copy">当前页面从 {{rawPayloadCount}} 条受保护 digest payload 中仅渲染 {{monitoredCount}} 张卡；重复 canonical `stock_code` 已去重 {{dedupedCount}} 次。</text>
<text class="contract-copy">若同一 `stock_code` 同时出现 ready digest 与更新更晚的等待/占位重复行，页面仍优先展示 ready digest；若不存在 ready digest，则等待态卡片继续保留。</text>
Placeholder/waiting-state cards remain visible after dedupe when no ready digest exists, so pending watched stocks are not dropped from the Mini home surface.

artifactReferences.reason: Preview shows one-card-per-stock_code, ready-over-placeholder precedence, and placeholder retention text.

assertions.title: Auth failures do not fall through to stale, mock, or empty-success watch cards
assertions.proofSummary: Missing/invalid sessions return auth-required, persisted sessions are cleared on 401/login failures, controller empties card state, and the page/preview explicitly say no mock, stale, or fake-success cards are shown when auth is missing or failed.

commandEvidence.observed: Passing tests include: login failure modes remain distinguishable to the Mini client; login failures clear any stale persisted session before later auth-required hydrates; missing or invalid auth clears protected cards and returns an auth-required state.

sourceReferences.text: message: '当前未检测到可用 Bearer 会话，页面已阻止显示任何受保护盯盘卡片。',
message: '摘要读取未成功完成，已保持受保护内容关闭，避免显示过期或伪成功数据。',
message: '登录会话未能完成受保护摘要读取，页面已清空所有盯盘卡片并返回 auth-required 状态。',
<text class="empty-state-copy">未认证或认证失败时，不显示任何 mock、stale 或 fake-success 空盯盘卡片。</text>

artifactReferences.reason: Preview shows auth-required state plus blank_credentials / invalid_credentials / missing_fields evidence.
Summary records authRequired=missing_or_invalid_session and explicit login failure codes.

assertions.title: The Mini boundary stays contract-first and presentation-neutral
assertions.proofSummary: The home controller selects only compact shared digest-card fields, maps them into render state, ignores preview payload extras such as symbol/route/report/browser context, and the generated preview explicitly states that browser routes, report bodies, and runtime-specific context are not required.

commandEvidence.observed: Validator output includes a passing test that selectCompactDigestCards keeps one canonical card per stock_code and strips non-compact fields.

sourceReferences.text: report_body: 'heavy preview body that must not be required by the Mini home surface',
The Mini mapping consumes only compact digest-card fields and does not require report bodies, browser routes, or runtime-specific context.

artifactReferences.reason: Preview states that only compact digest-card fields are consumed and browser/report/runtime context is unnecessary.
Summary enumerates compactFieldKeys for the Mini digest-card baseline.

summary: Tested 5 assigned assertions on the Mini source/build surface: 5 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Evidence shows a real top-level mini/ validator, explicit local-only disclosure, authenticated canonical stock_code card rendering with placeholder retention, auth-required fallback on missing/failed auth, and a compact presentation-neutral boundary.
